svg.title: Token Usage Dashboard Mobile — telemetry
svg.desc: Mobile token usage telemetry: 51.3B tokens, 93.0% cache hit, $51,020.63 estimated cost, peak 5.9B on 06-06. Pure SVG SMIL animation.
